holdings.infoBox: FEMV is an equity ETF with a total of 203 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 2.81%, Sandisk at 1.92%, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation at 1.38%, Corning at 1.24%, and Marathon Petroleum at 1.18%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced Mid Cap Value ETF (FEMV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is actively managed, selecting securities from the Russell Midcap Value Index. It aims for a portfolio of US mid-cap companies exhibiting value characteristics. FEMV was launched on Apr 28, 2026 and is issued by Fidelity.
